decisions.decision: Integration-style test: render real AssumptionBar (not mocked) so we can test 'clear all' and assumption tag rendering through the real component tree
alternatives_rejected: Mock AssumptionBar and test 'clear all' separately in AssumptionBar.test.tsx

decisions.decision: Mock VariableRow via vi.mock to isolate from its heavy internal hooks (useMarket, useSession, useProbabilityEdit, useAssumptions)
alternatives_rejected: Render real VariableRow and mock all its internal API calls — too complex and couples tests to VariableRow internals

decisions.decision: Mock useMarkets at module level (vi.mock('@/lib/query/hooks')) to control the markets list, following TradingPanel.test.tsx pattern
alternatives_rejected: Mock API client and let React Query process — adds unnecessary async complexity

decisions.decision: Test both empty states: (a) no assumptions → 'Showing marginal probabilities' text, (b) activeMarkets.length <= 1 → 'Create more markets' message
alternatives_rejected: Test only one empty state — misses a distinct conditional branch

decisions.decision: Wrap with AssumptionProvider locally in the test file, not in shared renderWithProviders helper
alternatives_rejected: Extend shared helpers.tsx with AssumptionProvider — affects all test files for a single feature

decisions.decision: Test 'rendering assumption list' covers both: VariableRow list (correct count/order with current market first) and AssumptionBar tags (GIVEN: labels with correct assumption data)
alternatives_rejected: Test only one of the two lists — misses coverage of the other

steps.task: Create test file frontend/src/__tests__/AssumptionPanel.test.tsx with imports, vi.mock for VariableRow and useMarkets, and a local renderPanel helper that wraps with AssumptionProvider + renderWithProviders

Write test: 'renders heading and marginal probabilities status when no assumptions' — render with empty assumptions, assert 'Variables & Assumptions' heading and 'Showing marginal probabilities' text present

Write test: 'renders correct status text when assumptions are set' — use AssumptionProvider with pre-set assumptions, assert status shows 'Showing conditionals given N assumption(s)' with correct count and pluralization

Write test: 'renders VariableRow for each active market with current market first' — mock useMarkets to return 3 markets, assert mocked VariableRow rendered 3 times, verify first call receives current market's id
Write test: 'shows create-more-markets message when only one active market' — mock useMarkets with single active market, assert 'Create more markets to use assumptions' text visible
Write test: 'hides create-more-markets message when multiple active markets' — mock useMarkets with 2+ active markets, assert message NOT present
Write test: 'AssumptionBar shows assumption tags with GIVEN label' — render with assumptions in context, assert 'GIVEN:' text and assumption labels visible in AssumptionBar
Write test: 'AssumptionBar hidden when no assumptions' — render with empty context, assert no 'GIVEN:' text in document
Write test: 'clear all button removes all assumptions' — render with assumptions, click 'Clear all' button, assert status reverts to 'Showing marginal probabilities' and GIVEN: disappears
Write test: 'remove individual assumption via tag close button' — render with 2 assumptions, click remove button on one, assert it disappears while the other remains
Run vitest on AssumptionPanel.test.tsx, fix any failures, confirm all tests pass
